title: [TACZ] LesRaisins Tactical Equipements
description: An addon for tacz, with extra support about throwable, melee weapons for gun packs
body:
![lrtactical.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/lrtactical.png)
A addon for Timeless and Classics Guns Zero that add throwables, melee weapon and more support for gun packs

# Contents and Features

Built-in pack contains
<iframe width="796" height="469" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/0m2d-KuvxDc" style="width:796px" allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" frameborder="0"></iframe>

## Melee Weapon 
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/melee.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/melee.png)  
- Dagger  
- Karambit&lt  
- Baseball Bat  

## Throwables  
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/throwable.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/throwable.png)  
- M67 Grenade  
- RGN Grenade  
- Smoke Grenade  
- Flash Grenad  

## Shield  
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/shield.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/shield.png)  
- Flash Shield

## UGC Support
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/ugc.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/ugc.png)  
Additional ability to define melee weapon and throwable items for TACZ gunpacks.

## Dependency

![dependency.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/05/26/dependency.png)
This is a MOD, Please put the .jar file in the mods folder but not in tacz gun pack path. You need tacz 1.1.8 and above as a dependency from version 0.4.0
